meta.purpose: Melengkapi note_family dan description_simple untuk master notes Nuanscent berdasarkan export notes_parfum.json.
strategy: Preserve existing non-empty note_family and description_simple values.
Fill missing values using a controlled note-family mapping and concise Bahasa Indonesia descriptions.
Use slug/name matching in the seeder for idempotent updates.
